# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Pull Request Notification
on: [pull_request]
jobs:
  notify-prs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Commit message and notification system for PR title & description.
        run |
           echo "## ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV || exit 1   #PR Title in commit messages with a Markdown link (Refs #) syntax to auto-generate the issue url and open it via browser on GH actions UI
           echo "${{github.event.pull_request.body}}" | sed '0,/^\(*\)/ s//👉 \1/***/' >> $GITHUB_ENV || exit 2   #PR Description in commit messages with Markdown link syntax to auto-generate the issue url and open it via browser on GH actions UI
